inputs.name: target_logits
inputs.desc: Authoritative target/backbone logits for the candidate position.

inputs.name: draft_token
inputs.desc: Candidate token proposed by the assistant/draft model.

outputs.name: verified_token
outputs.desc: The emitted token: draft_token when accepted, otherwise the target argmax.

impl.c_declaration: void speculative_verify_greedy_f32(const float *target_logits, int vocab_size, int draft_token, int *accepted, int *verified_token);

notes: First-stage speculative decode verifier. It is intentionally greedy-only and one-token-only so the target model remains authoritative while the Gemma4 assistant bridge is hardened.
